category_sources: GitHub README says Parallel Disk Usage is a highly parallelized directory tree analyzer and pdu renders disk usage charts for files and directories.
source_facts.description says "Highly parallelized, blazing fast directory tree analyzer".
display_name_sources: GitHub README heading is "Parallel Disk Usage (pdu)".
docs_sources: GitHub README has a Usage section linking to USAGE.md for full help text.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/KSXGitHub/parallel-disk-usage, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: GitHub README says pdu renders graphical charts for disk usage of files and directories.
GitHub repository topics include rust, filesystem, size, pdu, du, and disk-usage.
